_comment: Baseline captured 2026-04-30 before lazy-load landed. Synthetic data used (no telemetry history pre-implementation). Update after 72h of production data with: python3 scripts/check_lazy_catalog_health.py --json > docs/06-Daily/measurements/lazy-catalog-baseline.json
notes: 5% baseline: estimated from pre-implementation sessions where agents described re-implementing existing skill functionality. Update this file with real telemetry after 72h of lazy-load operation.
